query:
-- Cancel FAVE Choc Vintage
INSERT INTO sku_meta (style, colour, leather, sample_status, order_qty, size_11, cost, fit_rating, fitting_notes, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('FAVE', 'CHOC', 'VINTAGE', 'cancelled', 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW();

-- Cancel MAMZELLE Black Nappa
INSERT INTO sku_meta (style, colour, leather, sample_status, order_qty, size_11, cost, fit_rating, fitting_notes, created_at, updated_at)

-- Cancel VIKA Chocolate Venice (stored as VIKA CHOCOLATE VENICE after rename)
INSERT INTO sku_meta (style, colour, leather, sample_status, order_qty, size_11, cost, fit_rating, fitting_notes, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('VIKA', 'CHOCOLATE', 'VENICE', 'cancelled', 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW();

-- Also cancel old VIKA CHOC VENICE record if it exists
INSERT INTO sku_meta (style, colour, leather, sample_status, order_qty, size_11, cost, fit_rating, fitting_notes, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('VIKA', 'CHOC', 'VENICE', 'cancelled', 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_status = 'cancelled', updated_at = NOW();
